5.5e.description: Subtract 1d4 from attack rolls and saving throws

5e.description: Subtract 1d4 from attack rolls and saving throws
Add 1d4 to all attack rolls and saving throws

5.5e.description: Add 1d4 to all attack rolls and saving throws

5e.description: Automatically fail sight-based checks; attacks against you have advantage; your attacks have disadvantage

5.5e.description: Automatically fail sight-based checks; attacks against you have advantage; your attacks have disadvantage

5e.description: Can't attack or harm the charmer; charmer has advantage on social checks against you

5.5e.description: Can't attack or damage the charmer; charmer has advantage on social checks against you

5e.description: Lose effect if concentration ends; taking damage requires Con save (DC 10 or half damage) to maintain; ends if incapacitated, dead, or casting another concentration spell

5.5e.description: Lose effect if concentration ends; taking damage requires Con save (DC 10 or half damage) to maintain; ends if incapacitated, dead, or starting another concentration effect

5e.description: Can't hear; automatically fail hearing-based ability checks

5.5e.description: Can't hear; automatically fail hearing-based ability checks

5e.description: Incapacitated, prone, cannot move or speak, unaware; drop held items; auto-fail Str and Dex saves; attacks against you have advantage; 5ft melee hits are criticals; make death saving throws each turn (10+ success)

5.5e.description: Incapacitated, prone, speed 0; drop held items; unaware; attacks against you have advantage; auto-fail Str and Dex saves; 5ft melee hits are criticals; make death saving throws each turn (10+ success)

5e.description: Cumulative exhaustion (1–6); die at 6; level 1 disadvantage ability checks; level 2 speed halved; level 3 disadvantage attacks and saves; level 4 max HP halved; level 5 speed 0; levels stack and include all lower effects; long rest or raise dead reduces level by 1 (ends at 0)

5.5e.description: Cumulative condition (levels); die at level 6; -2 per level to all d20 tests; speed reduced by 5 ft per level; long rest removes 1 level (ends at 0)

5e.description: Fall if prone, speed 0, or unable to move; doesn’t fall if it can hover or is magically held aloft

5.5e.description: Fall if incapacitated or prone or if fly speed becomes 0; can remain airborne if able to hover

5e.description: Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls while source of fear is visible; can't move closer to source of fear

5.5e.description: Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls while source of fear is visible; can't move closer to source of fear

5e.description: Speed 0 (no speed bonuses); ends if grappler incapacitated or if removed from grappler’s reach/effect

5.5e.description: Speed 0; disadvantage on attacks against targets other than grappler; grappler can move you but costs extra movement (1:1 extra cost unless Tiny or much smaller)

5e.description: Speed doubled; +2 AC; advantage on Dex saves; +1 action per turn (Attack 1 weapon attack, Dash, Disengage, Hide, or Use Object); on end: can't move or take actions until after next turn

5.5e.description: Speed doubled; +2 AC; advantage on Dex saves; one extra action per turn (Attack 1 hit, Dash, Disengage, Hide, or Utilize only); on end: incapacitated and speed 0 until end of next turn

5e.description: Disadvantage on ability checks with the chosen ability

5.5e.description: Disadvantage on ability checks with the chosen ability

5e.description: Outlined in light; sheds 10-ft dim light; attacks against affected targets have advantage if visible; no benefit from invisibility

5.5e.description: Outlined in light; sheds 10-ft dim light; attacks against affected targets have advantage if visible; can't benefit from invisibility

5e.description: Can't take actions or reactions

5.5e.description: Can't act (no actions, bonus actions, reactions); concentration ends; can't speak; disadvantage on initiative if incapacitated when rolling

5e.description: Can't be seen (except by special senses/magic); heavily obscured for hiding; location can be detected by sound/tracks; attacks against you have disadvantage; your attacks have advantage

5.5e.description: Advantage on initiative if invisible when rolling; can't be targeted by effects requiring sight unless creator can see you; equipment is also hidden; attacks against you have disadvantage; your attacks have advantage (only vs creatures that can't see you)

5e.description: Incapacitated; can't move or speak; auto-fail Str and Dex saves; attacks against you have advantage; melee hits are criticals if attacker is within 5 ft

5.5e.description: Incapacitated; speed 0; auto-fail Str and Dex saves; attacks against you have advantage; melee hits are criticals

5e.description: Turned into solid inanimate substance (usually stone; includes gear), weight ×10, stops aging; incapacitated, unaware, can't move or speak; auto-fail Str and Dex saves; attacks against you have advantage; resistance to all damage; immune to poison and disease (existing effects suspended)

5.5e.description: Turned into solid inanimate substance (usually stone; includes gear), weight ×10, stops aging; incapacitated; speed 0; auto-fail Str and Dex saves; attacks against you have advantage; resistance to all damage; immune to poisoned condition

5e.description: Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks

5.5e.description: Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks

5e.description: Must crawl or spend half speed to stand; disadvantage on attack rolls; 5ft melee attacks against you have advantage, others have disadvantage.

5.5e.description: Must crawl or spend half speed to stand (can't stand if speed 0); disadvantage on attack rolls; 5ft melee attacks against you have advantage, others have disadvantage

5e.description: Speed 0 (no speed bonuses); attacks against you have advantage; your attacks have disadvantage; disadvantage on Dexterity saving throws

5.5e.description: speed 0; attacks against you have advantage; your attacks have disadvantage; disadvantage on Dexterity saving throws

5e.description: At 0 HP doesn't make death saves (stable) but remains unconscious; if damaged, resumes death saves; regains 1 HP after 1d4 hours if not healed

5.5e.description: At 0 HP but not making death saving throws (stable)

5e.description: Incapacitated; can't move; can only speak falteringly; auto-fail Str and Dex saves; attacks against you have advantage

5.5e.description: Incapacitated; auto-fail Str and Dex saves; attacks against you have advantage

5e.description: Incapacitated, prone, unaware; can't move or speak; drop held items; auto-fail Str and Dex saves; attacks against you have advantage; 5ft melee hits are criticals

5.5e.description: Incapacitated, prone, unaware; speed 0; drop held items; auto-fail Str and Dex saves; attacks against you have advantage; 5ft melee hits are criticals
